publicMeaning: A claim exists but no proof package has been submitted.
Evidence has been provided but not yet validated.
The project has run completeness and integrity checks.
The proof package is structured enough for external review.
A qualified independent party can reproduce or inspect the claim path.
Human/governance authority has accepted the claim within stated boundaries.
A signed receipt, public hash, or optional anchor records the decision.
The accepted proof may influence future missions, reputation, or reusable capability.
